Platinum.description: Enterprise / Platinum customers — near-immediate response required

Gold.description: Business / Gold customers — same business day response

Silver.description: Standard / Silver customers — next business day acceptable

Bronze.description: Trial / Bronze customers — best effort, no contractual obligation

data_privacy_request.note: GDPR / regulatory — always treat as critical regardless of tier

cancellation_request.note: Revenue at risk — always escalate to account management

billing_dispute.note: Financial impact — escalate if unresolved within first_response window

auto_approve_if.note: Auto-approve returns for customers with good purchase history and low return rate

escalate_if.note: Escalate to human review if return rate is high relative to purchases
